title: Filter bar component with confidence tiers, flags, stale filter, and sorting controls
purpose: Provides a UI component for filtering and sorting topic lists with confidence tiers, flag/draft toggles, stale filter, and sorting options.
module_context: Defines confidence tier options and sort field options as constants. Exports the FilterBar React component with props for filters, sort field, and sort order.

steps.content: Render a container div with styling and optional class names.
Display confidence tier filter checkboxes with labels.
Render a divider between confidence and toggle filters.
Show toggle filters for flags, drafts, and stale items.
Include a flexible spacer element to push sort controls to the right.
Render sort by dropdown with options for name, confidence, last verified, and access count.
Display sort order toggle button with ascending and descending icons.
Get the current confidence filter values from the filters object.
If the checkbox is checked, add the tier to the confidence array.
IF the checkbox is unchecked, remove the tier from the confidence array.
Update the filters with the new confidence array, removing it if empty.
Update the filters object with the boolean value for the specified key.
IF the checkbox is unchecked, set the key value to undefined.
Update the filters object with the staleDays value set to 30 when checked.
IF the checkbox is unchecked, set staleDays to undefined.
